title: bromus grossus var. nitidus
intro: Bromus grossus var. nitidus, also known as the Smooth Brome Grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is native to Europe and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Bromus grossus var. nitidus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
